## 📦 Application Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Application Name** | |
| **Official Website** | |
| **Category** | e.g., `web_browsers`, `development`, `utilities` |
| **License** | e.g., MIT, GPL-3.0, Proprietary |
| **Description** | One-line description of what the application does |

---

## 🗃️ Package Availability

Please fill in the package name for each package manager where this app is available:

| Package Manager | Package Name / Install Command |
|---|---|
| `apt` (Debian/Ubuntu) | |
| `dnf` (Fedora/RHEL) | |
| `pacman` (Arch) | |
| `zypper` (openSUSE) | |
| `flatpak` | |
| `snap` | |

> If not available in a package manager, leave it blank.

---

## 🔗 Additional Notes

<!-- Any special install instructions, PPAs, external repos, or notes about the package. -->

---

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have verified the application is not already in the catalog
- [ ] I have confirmed the package names are correct for each package manager
- [ ] The application is suitable for a general Linux audience
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR to add this entry (optional)
